label: WrittenConsent
name: Written Consent
description: Authorizes disclosure and must include an expiration date.

label: CourtOrder
name: Court Order
description: A specialized node that forces disclosure and overrides confidentiality restrictions.

label: SecurityPolicy
name: Security Policy
description: A policy that a Part 2 Program must implement and protect records with.

label: NoticeOfPrivacyPractices
name: Notice of Privacy Practices
description: A required operational privacy notice control.

label: ScientificResearchException
name: Scientific Research Exception
description: An exception node that applies to permit lawful disclosure.

label: ConfidentialityRestriction
name: Confidentiality Restriction
description: Strict restrictions upon the use and disclosure of records that operate on a default deny logic.

label: Complaint
name: Complaint of Noncompliance
description: Process allowing patients to file a complaint to the Secretary for violations of the regulation.

label: Purpose
name: Treatment Payment and Operations
description: A specific description of purpose when a patient provides consent for these broader operational uses.
